appraisal_events.evidence: « Cette “brave duchesse de Guermantes” … ne signifiait pas que Robert de Saint-Loup considérât duchesse de Guermantes comme particulièrement bonne… “Bonne” sert de hors-d'oeuvre… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator reveals that Robert’s phrase is mere conversational padding rather than genuine praise, exposing his speech as hesitating and non-committal.

status_effects.explanation: His local standing in the exchange is slightly weakened because his words are framed as empty fillers rather than substantive evaluation.
